autor: it's fluid in motion. Your world is very malleable like clay desiring to be something useful. Go ahead feel free to hammer your life into shape like a skilled Blacksmith.
explicacao: Citação de it's fluid in motion. Your world is very malleable like clay desiring to be something useful. Go ahead feel free to hammer your life into shape like a skilled Blacksmith. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Your future is not fixed” articula reflexao, donavan-nelson-butler, master-sergeant-us-army em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como master-sergeant-us-army.
